allow:
Bash(node server.js &
sleep 1
# Create test directory structure
mkdir -p uploads/test-a/test-a1
# Test upload to nested directory
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8888/api/upload -F "dir=test-a/test-a1" -F "files=@package.json" 
echo ""
echo "--- Files in test-a/test-a1 ---"
ls -la uploads/test-a/test-a1/ 2>/dev/null || echo "Directory not found or empty")

Bash(node server.js &
sleep 1
echo "=== Test 1: Upload to nested directory \(no timestamp\) ==="
mkdir -p uploads/testdir/subdir
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8888/api/upload \\
  -F "dir=testdir/subdir" \\
  -F "files=@package.json"
echo ""

echo "=== Test 2: Upload same filename again \(should get -1 suffix\) ==="
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8888/api/upload \\
  -F "dir=testdir/subdir" \\
  -F "files=@package.json"
echo ""

echo "=== Test 3: Upload same filename third time \(should get -2 suffix\) ==="
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8888/api/upload \\
  -F "dir=testdir/subdir" \\
  -F "files=@package.json"
echo ""

echo "=== Files in testdir/subdir ==="
ls -1 uploads/testdir/subdir/)

Bash(echo "=== Test 4: Upload two same-name files in one batch ==="
# Create two temp files with the same name
mkdir -p /tmp/test-batch
cp package.json /tmp/test-batch/duplicate.txt
cp server.js /tmp/test-batch/duplicate.txt 2>/dev/null
# Actually create two files with same name from different content
echo "content1" > /tmp/dup.txt
echo "content2" > /tmp/dup2.txt
# Rename to same name
cp /tmp/dup.txt /tmp/test-batch/same.txt
cp /tmp/dup2.txt /tmp/same.txt

# Upload both files with same original name "same.txt"
mkdir -p uploads/batch-test
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8888/api/upload \\
  -F "dir=batch-test" \\
  -F "files=@/tmp/test-batch/same.txt" \\
  -F "files=@/tmp/same.txt"
echo ""

echo "=== Files in batch-test ==="
ls -1 uploads/batch-test/
echo ""
echo "=== Content check ==="
cat uploads/batch-test/same.txt
cat uploads/batch-test/same-1.txt 2>/dev/null)

Bash(echo "=== Test 5: Root directory upload should be blocked ==="
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8888/api/upload \\
  -F "files=@package.json"
echo ""

echo "=== Test 6: Chinese filename ==="
echo "测试内容" > /tmp/测试文件.txt
mkdir -p uploads/中文测试
curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8888/api/upload \\
  -F "dir=中文测试" \\
  -F "files=@/tmp/测试文件.txt"
echo ""
ls -1 uploads/中文测试/

# Clean up test files
rm -rf uploads/testdir uploads/batch-test uploads/中文测试 /tmp/test-batch /tmp/dup.txt /tmp/dup2.txt /tmp/same.txt /tmp/测试文件.txt
echo ""
echo "=== Cleanup done ===")
